◎简　　介  

　　Junior "JR" Bonner is a rodeo rider who is slightly "over the hill". Junior is first seen taping up his injuries after an unsuccessful ride on an ornery bull named Sunshine.He returns home to Prescott, Arizona for the Independence Day parade and rodeo.
